content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Number Circle". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1189/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of operations required to make all elements equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a greedy approach to find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements equal.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
min_val = min(a)
count = 0
for i in range(n):
    count += a[i] // min_val - 1
print(count)
